text.title: STRIDE Threat Model Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Apply the decision tree in `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Verify Applies-If preconditions hold; pre-filter via Skip-If.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and emit `skip-this-methodology` rationale to requester.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.action: Collect each prerequisite with declared type and source citation. Reject untyped or unsourced inputs at the gate.
step.decision-gate: If any required input missing, STOP and request from named owner; do NOT proceed with partial inputs.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.input: Typed input bundle + applicable rules from `01-core-rules.xml`
step.action: Draft the artefact per the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`. Apply each rule whose `applies_if` matches the input bundle.

step.name: validate-output
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-stride-threat-model-template.py --file <artefact>`. Address every VIOLATION line printed to stderr.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to step 3 and fix violations. Do not skip the validator under deadline pressure.

step.name: register-and-review
step.input: Validated artefact + named owner + last_reviewed date
step.action: Commit the artefact to its canonical store (repo path / wiki). Set `owner`, `last_reviewed`, `version`. Notify named consumers.
step.output: Registered artefact live in the repo with audit trail
